name: FRM: Cybernugget Bass
description: Turing machine bass synthesizer with additive harmonics, sub-bass, and portamento

knobs.5: Turing loop probability (CCW=always change, CW=frozen loop)

gate_out.1: Fires on accent step (gate in 2 high)
gate_out.2: Fires on non-accent step (gate in 2 low)

cv_out.1: Alt note pitch from Turing hi-byte (1V/oct, 0V = MIDI 60)
cv_out.2: Main note pitch with octave shift (1V/oct, 0V = MIDI 60)

leds: Turing register lower 8 bits as bitmap (1 LED per bit)
audio_out: Stereo filtered bass synthesis + audio in
